sentences.arabic: كَانَ عَلِيٌّ يُقَارِنُ نَفْسَهُ بِأَصْدِقَائِهِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Ali je uvijek poređivao sebe sa prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Ali always used to compare himself to his friends.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ بِالْحُزْنِ لِأَنَّهُ لَا يَعُدُّ نَفْسَهُ جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: Osjećao se tužno jer sebe nije smatrao dobrim.
sentences.translationEn: He felt sad because he did not consider himself good enough.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لَهُ أُمُّهُ «أَنْتَ مُمَيَّزٌ وَلَيْسَ كَأَحَدٍ».
sentences.translation: Majka mu je rekla "ti si poseban i nisi kao niko drugi".
sentences.translationEn: His mother told him "you are special and unlike anyone else".

sentences.translation: Svaki čovjek ima talente koji mu pripadaju.
sentences.translationEn: Every person has talents that are unique to them.
